summary: Comprehensive smoke test for iter180-182 features: AI Hiring Flow, Concierge Mobile Admin, Outlook token encryption, Settings Overhaul, Luccca JARVIS Dashboard, and Share-with-team. All backend APIs passed (29/29 tests). Frontend panels verified working.
seed_data_creation: Created hiring batch via API, minted mobile token, created dashboard share
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter180-182 features fully tested. All new panels (Luccca Dashboard, Settings Overhaul, Concierge Mobile Admin, People Admin AI Hiring tab) are working. Public /board/{share_id} route works. Mobile companion page /m/concierge/{token} works. Backend APIs all passing.

iter180_ai_hiring.POST /api/hiring/rank: PASS - admin-gated, returns ranked candidates with fit_score, strengths, gaps, recommendation, interview_questions

iter180_concierge_mobile.GET /api/concierge-mobile/guests: PASS - returns roster with active_token_count per guest
iter180_concierge_mobile.GET /api/concierge-mobile/qr/{token}: PASS - returns valid SVG with <path> element

iter180_outlook_encryption.GET /api/outlook/status: PASS - returns 200 idempotent with configured/authenticated/connected status

iter181_settings_overhaul.panel_structure: PASS - Apple-style 2-column layout with 5 sections (Appearance, Display, Integrations, Data & Privacy, About)
iter181_settings_overhaul.appearance_controls: PASS - Mode (Light/Dark/Auto), Theme dropdown, Font Family dropdown, Font Size buttons, Accent Preview colors

iter182_dashboard.GET /api/dashboard/overview: PASS - returns 8 KPIs with correct labels, top_ticket_categories, celebrations_this_week, NO _id leakage
iter182_dashboard.GET /api/dashboard/board/{id}: PASS - public access, returns full board with overview + views counter, 404 on missing

frontend_panels.luccca_jarvis_dashboard: PASS - Greeting, AI narrative, 8 KPI tiles, Executive/Classic tabs, Customize button, Share-with-team button, Top tickets widget, Celebrations widget
frontend_panels.people_admin_ai_hiring: PASS - 5 tabs (Employees, Job Profiles, AI Hiring, Hours, Coverage), job profile dropdown, upload button, rank button, recent batches
frontend_panels.concierge_mobile_admin: PASS - 4 guest cards with tier pills, mint/re-mint buttons, QR display area
frontend_panels.settings_overhaul: PASS - 5 sidebar sections, theme/font/mode controls, accent preview
frontend_panels.public_board: PASS - Read-only KPI grid, no admin controls, view counter
frontend_panels.mobile_companion: PASS - Celebration banner, guest info, pending requests

regression.sidebar_sections: PASS - all 8 sections visible and expandable
